use_codes.desc: USE OF THE COMBINATION OF MACITENTAN AND TADALAFIL FOR THE CHRONIC TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH PULMONARY ARTERIAL HYPERTENSION
METHOD OF TREATING PULMONARY ARTERIAL HYPERTENSION COMPRISING ADMINISTERING A COMBINATION OF MACITENTAN AND TADALAFIL

indications.text:
1.1 Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension
OPSYNVI is the combination of macitentan and tadalafil indicated for the chronic treatment of
adults with pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH, WHO Group I and WHO Functional Class
(FC) II-III).
Individually, macitentan reduces the risk of clinical worsening event...
